theater_description: The urban core of Kobani after ISIS had reached the town and mass civilian evacuation was underway. This excludes the larger Kobani region and surrounding refugee-hosting areas in Turkey.
geometry_method_note: Bounded to the town core where Reuters and allied reports explicitly described evacuation, remaining residents, and street fighting.
military_area_note: Combatant-side coding keeps ISIS, Kurdish defenders, and coalition air support explicit in narrative review, but no city-bounded combatant exposure time series was strong enough for publishable person-month denominators.
civilian_area_note: Civilian exposure is modeled only for the shrinking civilian presence still inside the town after 2014-10-06, not for the much larger regional refugee population.
split_reason: A single episode is used because the main analytic challenge is the rapid collapse of the resident civilian denominator inside the town once evacuation accelerated.
quality_note: Civilian outflow and residual-population logic are sourceable, but full-episode direct civilian and combatant death numerators are not strong enough for a publishable DR.
